dialogue1.phrase: Oops! You've entered a Recruitment Fair!

dialogue2.phrase: Now's your chance to hire a new developer.

dialogue3.phrase: Each developer has different skills, shown in a chart next to them!

dialogue4.phrase: These skills are represented by the quality attributes of ISO/IEC 25010 — the most modern version, from 2023.

dialogue5.phrase: We need to adapt quickly to changes to stay in the market.

dialogue6.phrase: Back to the subject: some are great at security. Others write code so flexible it bends in the wind.

dialogue7.phrase: ...Which is probably a structural problem in the system.

dialogue8.phrase: In short: you can hire developers according to your needs. If you don't like the candidates, you can skip the current fair by right‑clicking the event icon.

dialogue9.phrase: ...But not this time. You need a developer to work for you.

dialogue10.phrase: Phew! I know it seems like a lot of information at first.

dialogue11.phrase: That's why you can access important details in the Guide Notebook. Right here, the book in the bottom left corner of the screen!
